title: NMSA 1-1-3.2. Election observer
text:
1-1-3.2. Election observer. 
As used in the Election Code, "election observer" means a person registered with the United 
States department of state as an international election observer or a person registered with the 
New Mexico secretary of state who is an academic engaged in research on elections and the 
election process.

History: Laws 2011, ch. 137, § 1.
